ddls:
CREATE TABLE "chemical_components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chemical component */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the chemical component */,
  "molecular_formula" TEXT /* Molecular formula of the chemical component */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the chemical component (g/mol) */,
  "cas_number" TEXT /* CAS number of the chemical component */,
  "safety_data" TEXT /* Safety data for handling and storage */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the chemical component data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the experiment */,
  "method" TEXT /* Detailed methodology used in the experiment */,
  "results" TEXT /* Summary of the results obtained */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., in progress, completed, archived) */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laboratory where the experiment was conducted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES laboratories ("lab_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the data belongs to */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the chemical component the data is about */,
  "peak_area_percent" REAL /* Peak area percent of the chemical component */,
  "rt" REAL /* Retention time (RT) of the chemical component */,
  "structure" TEXT /* Structure of the chemical component */,
  "raw_data" TEXT /* Raw data collected during the experiment */,
  "processed_data" TEXT /* Processed data after analysis */,
  "metadata" TEXT /* Additional information about the data (e.g., instrument settings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_data_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES chemical_components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_data_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Role or position of the researcher within the institution */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the researcher */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laboratory the researcher is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_researchers_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES laboratories ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laboratories" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the laboratory */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the person in charge of the laboratory */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the laboratory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the equipment */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laboratory the equipment belongs to */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the equipment */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Last calibration date of the equipment */,
  "next_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date when the next calibration is due */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_equipment_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES laboratories ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_equipment" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the equipment used in the experiment */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was first used in the experiment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the equipment was last used in the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id", "equipment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the publication is about */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the publication was published */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the publication was published */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the journal */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the journal */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page numbers of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, laboratory technician, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Securely stored password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* ID of the laboratory the user is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES laboratories ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* Information about the user's browser and device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes made in the version */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the changes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the notification was sent to */,
  "message" TEXT /* Message of the notification */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the notification was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the notification (e.g., sent, read, deleted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "settings" (
  "setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each setting */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the setting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("setting_id")
)
